import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5001/api';// Create axios instance
const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Add token to requests
apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('adminToken');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});// Handle responses and errors
apiClient.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('adminToken');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});// Auth API
export const authAPI={login:credentials=>apiClient.post('/auth/login',credentials),logout:()=>apiClient.post('/auth/logout'),getSession:()=>apiClient.get('/auth/session')};// Users API
export const usersAPI={getUsers:params=>apiClient.get('/users',{params}),getUser:id=>apiClient.get("/users/".concat(id)),updateUser:(id,data)=>apiClient.put("/users/".concat(id),data),deleteUser:id=>apiClient.delete("/users/".concat(id)),banUser:id=>apiClient.post("/users/".concat(id,"/ban")),unbanUser:id=>apiClient.post("/users/".concat(id,"/unban"))};// Content API
export const contentAPI={getContent:params=>apiClient.get('/content',{params}),createContent:data=>apiClient.post('/content',data),updateContent:(id,data)=>apiClient.put("/content/".concat(id),data),deleteContent:id=>apiClient.delete("/content/".concat(id)),setFeatured:function(id){let featured=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:true;return apiClient.post("/content/".concat(id,"/feature"),{featured});},uploadThumbnail:(id,file)=>{const formData=new FormData();formData.append('thumbnail',file);return apiClient.post("/content/".concat(id,"/thumbnail"),formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});}};// Analytics API
export const analyticsAPI={getStats:()=>apiClient.get('/analytics/stats'),getTopContent:params=>apiClient.get('/analytics/top-content',{params}),getActiveUsers:params=>apiClient.get('/analytics/active-users',{params}),getViewsOverTime:params=>apiClient.get('/analytics/views-over-time',{params})};// Settings API
export const settingsAPI={getProfile:()=>apiClient.get('/settings/profile'),updateProfile:data=>apiClient.put('/settings/profile',data),changePassword:data=>apiClient.put('/settings/password',data),getNotifications:params=>apiClient.get('/settings/notifications',{params}),markNotificationRead:id=>apiClient.put("/settings/notifications/".concat(id,"/read")),markAllNotificationsRead:()=>apiClient.put('/settings/notifications/read-all'),deleteNotification:id=>apiClient.delete("/settings/notifications/".concat(id))};export default apiClient;
